description_pairs.source: PromptInputPanel component displays a panel with custom content
description_pairs.json: A simple panel container component that displays custom content.

description_pairs.source: RatingBlock - Universal rating block with title and star rating. Can be used for customer satisfaction surveys (CSAT), product reviews, article/video ratings, teacher evaluations, or any feedback collection.
description_pairs.json: Universal rating block with title and star rating.
A loading animation component that creates a shimmer effect over its children.
A star rating component for displaying and collecting user ratings from 1 to 5 stars.

description_pairs.source: Submit button component with state management through props. States: disabled, enabled, loading, cancelable (during loading).
description_pairs.json: A submit button component with state management through props and send/cancel icon switching.

description_pairs.source: Suggestions component displays a group of clickable suggestion buttons arranged in either horizontal (grid) or vertical (list) layout
description_pairs.json: A Suggestions component displays a group of clickable suggestion buttons arranged in either horizontal (grid) or vertical (list) layout.
Tabs component for switching between sections with optional delete functionality. Built on top of Gravity UI's Label component.

description_pairs.source: ThinkingMessage component displays AI model's internal reasoning process. Shows a collapsible block with thinking content and a copy button. Displays a loader when the thinking process is still in progress.
description_pairs.json: A message component that displays AI thinking process with collapsible content and a status indicator.
Footer component for tool messages with action buttons and status message
Header component for tool messages with icon, name, actions, and status indicators
